_meta.source: Extracted from 5 Dribbble UI references: fintech dashboard, settings/subscription panel, notifications screen, smart home app, EduWay edtech dashboard (iPad)
_meta.target: NFCS UNN Portal — Next.js + Tailwind CSS + Supabase implementation
_meta.theme: Clean minimal admin portal — light mode primary, neutral grays, one strong brand accent (NFCS deep forest green)
_meta.version: 2.0 — includes EduWay edtech dashboard patterns (task lists, note cards, schedule tables, pill filter tabs, progress bars, sidebar badge counts)
_meta.addedContext: Session-based dues payment: students pay per academic session; payment history must show session labels (e.g. '2024/2025 Session')
_meta.tailwindNote: All hex values map to custom Tailwind tokens. Use CSS variables for consistent theming.

gradients: DO NOT apply card-background gradients to icons or icon containers
DO NOT use button gradients on text elements
DO NOT apply sidebar active gradient to the full sidebar background — only to the active nav item pill
DO NOT use note/tag card colors (green, purple, amber) on form inputs or table rows
DO NOT apply page background color to modal/dialog backgrounds — modals use #FFFFFF
DO NOT apply EduWay-style soft mint page background (#E8EDE8) to card surfaces — cards stay #FFFFFF
shadows: DO NOT add drop shadows to flat icon fills
DO NOT apply card shadows to table rows — tables use dividers only
DO NOT add shadows to sidebar navigation items
DO NOT shadow the page-level background container
DO NOT add shadow to task list items — they sit on a white panel, not floating cards
borders: DO NOT add borders to selected/active nav items — use background fill instead
DO NOT add borders to primary buttons
DO NOT apply card border-radius to table cells — only to the table wrapper
DO NOT add a visible border to note cards (green, purple) — they use background color alone
colors: DO NOT use primary accent color for body text
DO NOT use muted/secondary text color for headings
DO NOT apply badge background colors directly to text without the pill/badge wrapper
DO NOT use white text on light-colored note cards (green/purple/amber) — use dark text for contrast
DO NOT use the progress bar fill color (#134116) for task status badges — use specific badge tokens instead
DO NOT apply schedule table row hover to the header row
layout: DO NOT collapse the three-column dashboard layout (sidebar + task panel + notes/schedule panel) to a single column without intentional responsive breakpoints
DO NOT make the sidebar the same background as the page — sidebar is always #FFFFFF on a tinted page bg
DO NOT stack pill filter tabs vertically — they are always horizontal overflow-x-auto on mobile

brand.comment: NFCS official brand colors. Primary accent used for sidebar active states, CTAs, focus rings, and session labels.

neutrals.comment: pageBackgroundMint is the EduWay-style soft warm-green tint used behind the main content area. pageBackground (#F4F6F8) is the default cool off-white.

noteCards.comment: Note card backgrounds are solid pastel fills — NOT gradients. DO NOT apply border to note cards.

inProgress.comment: EduWay amber pill for in-progress tasks

fontFamily.comment: Inter is the base. For display headings (dashboard KPIs, modal titles), use Inter Bold 700. For data tables, use JetBrains Mono for matric numbers, payment refs, session labels.

contextRules.tableRows: 0px — no radius on rows, only on wrapper

transitions.property: background-color, border-color, color, box-shadow, transform, opacity

pageShell.comment: Page-level background is a cool off-white. Cards sit on top. Use #EAEDE8 as alternative if the mint-green EduWay tone is preferred.

sidebar.comment: Sidebar is always white on a tinted page. Never tinted, never transparent.

threeColumn.comment: EduWay-style: sidebar + main task panel + side notes/schedule panel

logoMark.comment: Brand logomark — solid dark NFCS green, NOT gradient

icon.comment: Nav icons are muted tertiary in default state
Active state: icons turn white. DO NOT keep them green.

active.comment: Full dark pill — no left border indicator, no underline

badge.comment: EduWay-style notification count badge on nav items (Tasks: 5, Chat: 2, Notes: 3)

primary.comment: Default badge uses indigo — matches EduWay reference

attention.comment: Use danger red for critical count (overdue dues, pending approvals)

navGroup.comment: Visual grouping: main nav items, then a gap, then utility items (Settings, Log out)

userProfile.position: bottom of sidebar, above utility items

statsCard.comment: KPI cards in dashboard top row — 4 across on desktop
statsCard.DO_NOT: Do not add icons inside stat cards unless in a separate icon container with its own background. DO NOT apply noteCard colors to stat cards.

dataCard.comment: General content cards — wraps task lists, payment summaries, event panels, schedule panels

addButton.comment: EduWay + icon in card header — used for 'Add task', 'Add note'

dropdownFilter.comment: EduWay-style date/filter dropdown in card header (e.g. 'May 14, Mon ▾')

noteCard.comment: Colored highlight cards from EduWay — used for announcements, pinned notes, featured info. NO border, NO shadow — background color only.

green.DO_NOT: DO NOT use white text — use dark green text only for contrast

taskListItem.comment: EduWay-style task row inside a task list card. NOT a standalone card — it's a list item inside a white dataCard.

progressBar.comment: Inline progress bar for tasks in progress — shown below the task title
progressBar.DO_NOT: DO NOT show progress bar on 'To do' or 'Done' tasks — only on 'In progress'

statusPill.comment: Right-aligned status pill on task items

viewAllLink.comment: Bottom of task card — 'View all tasks' link

pillFilterTabs.comment: EduWay-style horizontal pill tab filters — used in task lists (All task / To do / In progress / Done) and member directory
DO_NOT: DO NOT apply underline-style active indicator to pill tabs — use filled background
DO NOT stack pill tabs vertically
DO NOT make all pills the same width — let content determine width

scheduleTable.comment: EduWay-style schedule/timetable inside a white dataCard — used for event schedule, exam timetable, meeting schedule

wrapper.comment: Schedule table has NO outer wrapper card shadow — it's already inside a dataCard

DO_NOT: DO NOT add border-radius to individual rows — only to the outer wrapper
DO NOT add shadows to table rows
DO NOT use alternating row colors — hover state provides visual separation
DO NOT apply the table wrapper shadow to the schedule table inside a dataCard

moreButton.comment: Three-dot / ellipsis menu button — used in EduWay card headers and task rows

DO_NOT: DO NOT add box-shadow to any button variant
DO NOT use gradient backgrounds on buttons — solid colors only
DO NOT apply rounded-full to rectangular action buttons

badges.comment: Status pills, role badges, session labels. All use pill (border-radius: 9999px) EXCEPT sessionLabel which uses rectangular pill (6px).

sessionLabel.comment: Session-scoped dues labels — '2024/2025 Session'. Rectangular pill, not full round.

DO_NOT: DO NOT apply pill styles directly to raw text — always wrap in a span
DO NOT mix badge background with page background
DO NOT use full borderRadius (9999px) on sessionLabel — use 6px

fileUpload.comment: Passport photo upload — dashed border drop zone

DO_NOT: DO NOT apply card shadows to form inputs
DO NOT use brand green as the input background on focus — only as the border/ring color
DO NOT add border-radius larger than 8px to standard form inputs

underlineVariant.comment: Standard underline tabs — used on detail pages, settings, notification filters

pillVariant.comment: Compact segment control — used in dashboard quick filters

progressBar.comment: Used in task items (in-progress tasks) and dues completion indicators

inline.comment: Thin 4px progress bar used inside task list items

fallback.comment: Initials from full name — first + last name initial, e.g. 'EO'

emptyState.comment: Empty panels when no tasks, no members, no payments yet

action.comment: Optional CTA button — use primary button variant

sessionDues.comment: Core NFCS feature — students pay dues per academic session. Session label format: '2024/2025 Session'

filters.status: pill filter tabs — All / Active / Pending / Alumni
filters.duesStatus: pill filter tabs — All / Paid / Unpaid

alumni.description: Role upgraded from student by exco/admin

onSiteRegistration.comment: Exco-initiated registration flow — same form, submitted directly as active

banner.text: Onsite registration — member will be activated immediately

dashboard.structure: topbar → statsRow(4 col) → mainContentRow(task panel + right panel) → recentTable
dashboard.rightPanel: notes cards grid (2 col) + schedule table

listPage.structure: pageHeader(title + primary CTA) → filterRow(pillTabs + search + dropdown filters) → dataTable

detailPage.structure: breadcrumb → profileHeaderCard → underlineTabs → tabbed content cards

formPage.structure: pageHeader → formCard(sectioned with dividers) → stickyFooter(cancel + submit)

tailwindCustomConfig.comment: Add these to tailwind.config.js extend block for consistent token usage
